response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Request denied under conservative sharing policy—peer SoC is 0.10 below threshold (0.45 vs 0.55 minimum), and neighborhood-wide deficit means no reciprocal support capacity exists; strict conservation required.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c0. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.55, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood-wide energy deficit with all geographic peers below sharing thresholds; no peer is currently able to reciprocate support, necessitating strict conservation..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
